tamil nadu.aqi_note: Coastal metro pollution and humidity can worsen fatigue on high-AQI days.

karnataka.aqi_note: Traffic density and seasonal dust can trigger symptom spikes for sensitive users.

maharashtra.aqi_note: Urban congestion can raise respiratory strain and fatigue.

delhi.aqi_note: High pollution periods may increase fatigue and breathing discomfort.

kerala.aqi_note: Humidity can make sleep quality and fatigue tracking especially important.

west bengal.aqi_note: Seasonal air-quality shifts can affect tiredness and breathing patterns.

national_schemes: Ayushman Bharat: check eligibility for subsidized healthcare coverage.
National Health Mission: district-level maternal and primary care services.
Anaemia Mukt Bharat: iron and nutrition awareness for women and adolescents.

tamil nadu: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme.
State nutrition and maternal health support programs.
karnataka: Karnataka Arogya coverage support and state hospital assistance programs.
maharashtra: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Jan Arogya Yojana.
delhi: Delhi Arogya Kosh and state hospital support schemes.

bias_notes.iron_deficiency_anemia: Research and screening on anemia in women can be under-prioritized, so repeated symptoms should be documented and checked.
bias_notes.pcos: PCOS symptoms are often dismissed as 'just irregular periods'; tracking cycle data helps reduce bias in symptom interpretation.
bias_notes.thyroid_disorder: Thyroid symptoms in women are frequently confused with stress or lifestyle issues, so pattern tracking matters.
bias_notes.vitamin_d_deficiency: Fatigue and aches may be normalized in women, so low-sunlight and pain patterns should be noted.
bias_notes.diabetes_risk: Women may report diabetes symptoms later than men, so thirst and urination trends should be monitored early.
bias_notes.normal: No strong bias-sensitive risk signal detected from the current input.
